name: Breakfast Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Bulk Sausage or Cubed Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown sausage in a frying pan; drain off fat. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs. Add milk, mustard, and bread cubes. Let stand 5 minutes. Stir in three-quarters of the cheese.
3. Add the cooked/drained sausage. Mix well.
4. Pour into a 9x13 casserole dish.
5. Slice mushrooms and arrange on top. Sprinkle remaining cheese over top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes. Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
